ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to countries table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to regions table */,
  "demographic_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to demographic_types table */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to sources table */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_demographic_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_type_id") REFERENCES demographic_types ("demographic_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country (e.g., LR for Liberia) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Broader region of the country (e.g., Africa) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Bomi) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to countries table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_types" (
  "demographic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic type */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic type (e.g., Annual Growth Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Open Data for Africa) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
column_names: Date the dataset was last modified
Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived)
ISO code of the country (e.g., LR for Liberia)
Broader region of the country (e.g., Africa)
Unique identifier for each demographic type
Name of the demographic type (e.g., Annual Growth Rate)
Name of the source (e.g., Open Data for Africa)
